kvkk.title: Personal Data Protection Notice (KVKK)
kvkk.description: Information under the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law
kvkk.heroLead: Information under Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data
kvkk.intro: In accordance with Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK — Turkey's personal data protection legislation), you can find our notice regarding the processing of your personal data below.

headings.Veri Toplama ve Kullanım Amacı: Data Collection and Purpose of Use

gizlilik-politikasi.title: Privacy Policy
gizlilik-politikasi.description: Protection of your personal data and privacy
gizlilik-politikasi.heroLead: Protection of your personal data and privacy
gizlilik-politikasi.intro: At Yiğit Çelik Kapı, protecting the privacy and security of your personal data is one of our highest priorities. This privacy policy explains how your personal data is collected, processed and protected under Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK).

headings.Veri Toplama ve Kullanım Amacı: Data Collection and Purpose of Use

kullanim-kosullari.title: Terms of Use
kullanim-kosullari.description: Terms and conditions for use of this website
kullanim-kosullari.heroLead: Terms and conditions for use of this website
kullanim-kosullari.intro: These terms of use apply to all visitors to https://yigitcelikkapi.com.tr/. Anyone who begins using the site is deemed to have accepted the conditions set out below.
